remarks: Multiple offers have been received on 189 Westover Road, and the sellers have requested all highest and best offers by Tuesday, 5/19 at 6:00 PM. WESTOVER GEM - CUSTOM RANCH BUILT FOR ENTERTAINING! Sprawling raised ranch on a prime 0.79-acre lot in Stamford's highly sought-after Westover neighborhood. Circular front driveway plus rear access to an oversized 2-car garage-ideal for hosting, extra parking, and seamless flow for gatherings. VERSATILE LAYOUT with incredible flexibility! Finished lower level offers a private, separate-entry living space-perfect for in-law, au pair, or extended stay-featuring a fireplace and direct access to its own deck. The main level delivers OPEN, FUNCTIONAL LIVING with a dramatic great room boasting cathedral ceilings and French doors leading to a massive 20' x 23' Trex deck-built for indoor/outdoor entertaining. Eat-in kitchen featuring stainless steel appliances, detailed tilework, generous dining space, and a unique built-in brick hearth/oven that adds warmth, character, and exceptional entertaining appeal. The formal dining room and cozy den with fireplace provide the perfect setting for holidays and special occasions. HARDWOOD FLOORS throughout. Spacious bedrooms including a primary suite with private bath. SET UP TO ENTERTAIN-comfortably host large groups with ease! LOCATION, LOCATION-minutes to schools, shopping, houses of worship, and Hubbard Heights Golf Course. Easy access to Merritt Parkway, I-95, and Metro-North.
